productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Silver-Toned Dial Watch NE6027SL01
description: Article number: NE6027SL01Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case with metallic details, stainless steel backDial style: Silver-toned dial, branding at the 3-hour mark, silver-toned hour and minute hands, a pink seconds hand, silver-toned and stone-studded markingsStrap style: White leather strap secured with a tang clasp, a fixed loop and a movable loop to hold the tail in placeFeatures: Screw to reset timeWater-resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature Fastrack caseWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase
